full_text:
Omental tumor surrounded by soft omental tissue was divided in two pieces. One piece was digested with dispase by Abhilash for 30 min, and the other one with Collagenase & Hyaluronidase by María for 1.5 h. Dispase dissociation was done in 20 mL of Dispase + dissociation medium, and C&H dissociation was done in 15 mL of C&H + dissociation medium. The corresponding pellets after diggestions were both small, and were resuspended in 1 mL of dissociation media.

Dispase dissociation:

Cell count 1):

total: 6.7E4

live:

viability:

size: 7.6um

Cell count 2):

total: 6.5E4

live:

viability:

size: 8.2um

Total cell count: 6.6E5

Total volume: 1 mL

C&H dissociation:

Cell count 1):

total: 1.84E6 cells/mL

live: 9.08E5 cells/mL

viability: 49.3%

size: 7.9 um

Cell count 2):

total: 1.88E6 cells/mL

live: 9.61E5 cells/mL

viability: 51.2%

size: 9.2 um

Total cell count: 1.86E6 cells/mL

Total volume: 1 mL

Cells from the Dispase dissociation were frozen in 1 mL of Stem Cell banker, and cells from the C&H dissociation were used to test the new antibodies for the fibroblast panel.

Reagent | Stock concentration | Working concentration | Ratio
Omentum gel | 17.7 mg/mL | 2.5 mg/mL | 0.141
Aprotinin | 10 mg/mL | 33.3 ug/mL | 0.003
Thrombin | 100 U | 0.3 U | 0.003
Fibrinogen | 25 ug/mL | 0.5 ug/mL | 0.02
